exercises.question: You must _____ tired after traveling all day.
exercises.explanation: Động từ khuyết thiếu 'must' + V inf (be).

exercises.question: You'd better _____ now before the traffic gets too bad.
exercises.explanation: Had better + V inf (go): lời khuyên.

exercises.question: He lets us _____ some of his land.
exercises.explanation: Let + O + V inf (use): cho phép ai làm gì.

exercises.question: You can't make a cat _____ anything it doesn't want to do.
exercises.explanation: Make + O + V inf (do): bắt ai phải làm gì.

exercises.question: I had John _____ my car.
exercises.explanation: Have + O + V inf (wash): nhờ ai làm gì cho mình (chủ động nhờ).

exercises.question: We saw her _____ off the bus.
exercises.explanation: See + O + V inf (get): nhìn thấy toàn bộ hành động từ đầu đến cuối.

exercises.question: Jane heard him _____ out at eight o'clock.
exercises.explanation: Hear + O + V inf (go): nghe thấy toàn bộ hành động.

exercises.question: He helped me _____ the bag.
exercises.explanation: Help + O + V inf hoặc to V: cả hai đều đúng. 'Carry' và 'to carry' đều được chấp nhận.

exercises.question: I'd rather _____ a taxi than take the bus.
exercises.explanation: Would rather + V inf (get): thích cái này hơn cái kia.

exercises.question: We used to _____ to the seaside every summer.
exercises.explanation: Used to + V inf (go): thói quen trong quá khứ mà bây giờ không còn.

exercises.question: I suggest that we _____ a while before making any decisions.
exercises.explanation: Suggest + (that) + S + (should) + V inf (wait): đưa ra gợi ý.

exercises.question: Do we have to _____ our shoes off?
exercises.explanation: Have to + V inf (take): sự bắt buộc.

exercises.question: Could you _____ me a favor?
exercises.explanation: Động từ khuyết thiếu 'could' + V inf (do).

exercises.question: I'd rather not _____ out tonight.
exercises.explanation: Would rather not + V inf (go): không thích làm gì.

exercises.question: She was seen _____ off the bus.
exercises.explanation: Dạng bị động của 'see + O + V inf' là 'be seen + to V' (không phải V inf).
